notes: Descriptor-only projection over existing MAS Stage-Led Autonomy routes.
OPL may index, inspect, display and dispatch MAS-exported guarded tasks only.
MAS keeps route contracts, controller runtime, evidence/review ledgers, publication gate and execution kernel.

stages.goal: Freeze a question-worthy study direction, evidence target, and immediate route recommendation. / Choose the strongest study line and freeze why it deserves managed execution.

boundary_assumptions: MAS owns study truth, route decisions, evidence/review ledgers, publication eval, and package authority.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition; it cannot authorize publication quality or submission readiness.

stages.summary: Direction and route selection projected from MAS-owned Stage-Led Autonomy routes for OPL discovery.
stages.title: Direction and route selection

stages.goal: Establish the baseline, comparator, and readiness proof for the active study line. / Run a primary managed experiment when the study line needs fresh main-result execution.

boundary_assumptions: MAS owns study truth, route decisions, evidence/review ledgers, publication eval, and package authority.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition; it cannot authorize publication quality or submission readiness.

stages.summary: Baseline and evidence setup projected from MAS-owned Stage-Led Autonomy routes for OPL discovery.
stages.title: Baseline and evidence setup

stages.goal: Close the bounded evidence gaps that still block claim acceptance or reviewer pressure.

boundary_assumptions: MAS owns study truth, route decisions, evidence/review ledgers, publication eval, and package authority.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition; it cannot authorize publication quality or submission readiness.

stages.goal: Convert the current evidence line into a manuscript-facing narrative that can withstand review.

stages.goal: Convert reviewer pressure, citation gaps, and evidence concerns into route-safe repair or decision work. / Record the official go, stop, reroute, or human-gate judgment for the active study line.

boundary_assumptions: MAS owns study truth, route decisions, evidence/review ledgers, publication eval, and package authority.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition; it cannot authorize publication quality or submission readiness.

stages.goal: Assemble the submission-facing package and verify that the line is ready for final judgment. / Resolve journal-facing packaging choices before final delivery or submission prep.

boundary_assumptions: MAS owns study truth, route decisions, evidence/review ledgers, publication eval, and package authority.
OPL admission only checks descriptor composition; it cannot authorize publication quality or submission readiness.
